final:
// // This module subtracts B from A when C is 1, and adds A and B when C is 0.
module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    input C,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);always @(*) begin
        if (C == 1) begin
            Q <= A + B;
        end else begin
            Q <= A - B;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module subtracts B from A when C is 1, and adds A and B when C is 0.
